overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The camera follows the character along wet sidewalks, past towering digital billboards, and across busy intersections with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy cyberpunk sidewalk with concrete retaining wall

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a white jacket along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to heavy traffic

notable_agents.action: walking ahead wearing white jacket and dark shorts, maintaining steady pace

entered.detail: tall gray concrete wall running parallel to the sidewalk
large illuminated billboard with red and white lettering
tall pole with bright linear LED lighting
tropical vegetation visible above the retaining wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy cyberpunk city street at night, following a pedestrian in a white jacket along a wet concrete sidewalk. A massive concrete retaining wall runs along the right side while neon billboards and streetlights illuminate the left. Palm trees are visible above the wall, and traffic moves steadily on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk downtown sidewalk approaching major intersection

events.description: pedestrian in green pants walks past in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past various neon advertisements, having passed the pedestrian in white

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction wearing green pants and dark jacket

entered.detail: large illuminated sign with red lettering on building facade
multiple glowing advertisement screens on building exteriors
pole with pedestrian crossing signals and traffic lights

segments.scene_description: Continuing along the retaining wall, the camera passes the pedestrian in white and approaches a major intersection. The ArmuBank neon sign dominates the left side while digital billboards illuminate the buildings ahead. A pedestrian in green pants passes by in the opposite direction as traffic flows steadily beside the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: large illuminated intersection with yellow crosswalk stripes

events.description: turns right and steps onto the crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
futuristic six-wheeled truck and other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through heavy traffic, navigating between moving vehicles

notable_agents.action: futuristic black SUV driving through the intersection from left to right
large white six-wheeled truck crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
open paved area where multiple roads meet with traffic markings

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right onto a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, entering a busy intersection. Heavy futuristic traffic flows through the crossing, including a prominent white six-wheeled truck. Neon signs from all directions illuminate the rainy pavement with colorful reflections as the camera navigates across the open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower downtown street with illuminated building facades

events.description: completes crossing and enters the opposite sidewalk along a new street corridor

agents.ego_description: walking down the street away from the intersection, passing modern glass buildings

entered.detail: tall modern buildings with glass windows and illuminated interiors
linear LED street lamps lining the sidewalk
glowing commercial signs attached to building exteriors

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the intersection, the camera proceeds down a narrower downtown street lined with modern glass buildings. The wet sidewalk reflects the neon advertisements and streetlights as the character moves away from the busy intersection into a quieter urban corridor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked cyberpunk district that transitions from a walled roadside into a bustling neon intersection and finally into a quieter urban corridor. It begins by following a pedestrian in a white jacket along a wet concrete sidewalk, flanked by a massive retaining wall and glowing billboards. As the camera passes the pedestrian, the scene opens up toward a major intersection dominated by a towering ArmuBank sign and flowing futuristic traffic. The camera then turns right to navigate across a wide, yellow-striped crosswalk, where the rainy pavement reflects a kaleidoscope of neon lights and a large white six-wheeled truck passes by. Finally, the view shifts away from the chaotic crossing and proceeds down a narrower downtown street lined with modern glass buildings and shimmering reflections.
